entries.name: Chainlink_rETH_ETH
entries.description: A Chainlink RETH / ETH price-feed proxy. It forwards price reads to a current aggregator and lets its owner propose then confirm a replacement aggregator, so whoever owns it can swap the price source behind the feed. It holds no funds and does no aggregation of its own.

event AnswerUpdated(int256 indexed current, uint256 indexed roundId, uint256 updatedAt)
event BillingSet(uint32 maximumGasPriceGwei, uint32 reasonableGasPriceGwei, uint32 observationPaymentGjuels, uint32 transmissionPaymentGjuels, uint24 accountingGas)

event ConfigSet(uint32 previousConfigBlockNumber, bytes32 configDigest, uint64 configCount, address[] signers, address[] transmitters, uint8 f, bytes onchainConfig, uint64 offchainConfigVersion, bytes offchainConfig)
event LinkTokenSet(address indexed oldLinkToken, address indexed newLinkToken)
event NewRound(uint256 indexed roundId, address indexed startedBy, uint256 startedAt)

event NewTransmission(uint32 indexed aggregatorRoundId, int192 answer, address transmitter, uint32 observationsTimestamp, int192[] observations, bytes observers, int192 juelsPerFeeCoin, bytes32 configDigest, uint40 epochAndRound)
event OraclePaid(address indexed transmitter, address indexed payee, uint256 amount, address indexed linkToken)
event OwnershipTransferRequested(address indexed from, address indexed to)
event OwnershipTransferred(address indexed from, address indexed to)
event PayeeshipTransferRequested(address indexed transmitter, address indexed current, address indexed proposed)
event PayeeshipTransferred(address indexed transmitter, address indexed previous, address indexed current)
event RoundRequested(address indexed requester, bytes32 configDigest, uint32 epoch, uint8 round)
event ValidatorConfigSet(address indexed previousValidator, uint32 previousGasLimit, address indexed currentValidator, uint32 currentGasLimit)
function getBilling() view returns (uint32 maximumGasPriceGwei, uint32 reasonableGasPriceGwei, uint32 observationPaymentGjuels, uint32 transmissionPaymentGjuels, uint24 accountingGas)
function getRoundData(uint80 _roundId) view returns (uint80 roundId, int256 answer, uint256 startedAt, uint256 updatedAt, uint80 answeredInRound)
function getValidatorConfig() view returns (address validator, uint32 gasLimit)
function latestConfigDetails() view returns (uint32 configCount, uint32 blockNumber, bytes32 configDigest)
function latestConfigDigestAndEpoch() view returns (bool scanLogs, bytes32 configDigest, uint32 epoch)
function latestRoundData() view returns (uint80 roundId, int256 answer, uint256 startedAt, uint256 updatedAt, uint80 answeredInRound)
function latestTransmissionDetails() view returns (bytes32 configDigest, uint32 epoch, uint8 round, int192 latestAnswer_, uint64 latestTimestamp_)
function setBilling(uint32 maximumGasPriceGwei, uint32 reasonableGasPriceGwei, uint32 observationPaymentGjuels, uint32 transmissionPaymentGjuels, uint24 accountingGas)
function setConfig(address[] signers, address[] transmitters, uint8 f, bytes onchainConfig, uint64 offchainConfigVersion, bytes offchainConfig)
function transmit(bytes32[3] reportContext, bytes report, bytes32[] rs, bytes32[] ss, bytes32 rawVs)

permission.description: collectively prevent the remaining signers from forming the configured report quorum.
relay price reports already authorized by the signer quorum to this aggregator.
authorize price reports for this aggregator by signing them.
collectively prevent every configured transmitter from submitting reports.
